author: doll-agent
content:
The issue claimed FerrayRecord 'handles generics but untested'. Adding generic tests revealed the macro was actually broken for generics: it generated 'std::mem::size_of::<Mixed>()' (no generic args) and 'static FIELDS' (statics can't reference outer-fn generics).

Fix: use #ty_generics_turbofish to produce 'Mixed::<A,B>' in offset_of! and size_of!, plus replace the LazyLock<Vec> static cache with a TypeId-keyed OnceLock<Mutex<HashMap>>. Each monomorphization gets its own slot keyed by TypeId::of::<Self>(); first call leaks a Box<[FieldDescriptor]> into the cache.

Add 3 tests: Pair<f64> + Pair<i32> (single type param, distinct dtypes), Mixed<A, B> with where clause.
